title: DAWN TO DAWN - 211info
text: EUGENE SERVICE STATION DAWN TO DAWN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a place for unsheltered individuals to sleep safely overnight in heated, heavy-duty communal tents. The shelter has a capacity for 125 guests with a low-barrier entry and no time limit for guests who follow the shelter guidelines. 450 Highway 99 N Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Homeless individuals ages 18 and older Hours: Bed Assignment: 2pm ESS is open 7 days per week 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 689-5820 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 689-6747 Main phone Main phone (541) 689-5820 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in to Eugene Service Station (ESS). First come first serve. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near LTD bus lines 40 and 41. Services: Urban Campsites Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - EUGENE SERVICE STATION HOUSING/SHELTER - OVERNIGHT PARKING PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE SERVICE STATION
